text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, December 28. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah found a new recipe to try. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Healthy choices are great. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: The smart-home hub is acting up today. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that modified the smart-home alert integrations. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a clean implementation. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Neighborhood connections are fun. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Moonlight Sonata for the upcoming piano recital. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: That's a big step. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Good weekend progress on home projects. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
